verses.text: Jethro hears of God's works and brings Moses' wife and two sons to him. Reunion. News of God's wonders draws the family.
Jethro hears of God's works and brings Moses' wife and two sons to him. Reunion. News of God's wonders draws the family.
Jethro hears of God's works and brings Moses' wife and two sons to him. Reunion. News of God's wonders draws the family.
Jethro hears of God's works and brings Moses' wife and two sons to him. Reunion. News of God's wonders draws the family.
Moses meets his father-in-law with honour and obeisance. Welcome. Reverence and joy mark their greeting.
Moses meets his father-in-law with honour and obeisance. Welcome. Reverence and joy mark their greeting.
Moses meets his father-in-law with honour and obeisance. Welcome. Reverence and joy mark their greeting.
Moses tells all the LORD did; Jethro rejoices for Israel. Rejoicing. God's deeds gladden even a Gentile heart.
Moses tells all the LORD did; Jethro rejoices for Israel. Rejoicing. God's deeds gladden even a Gentile heart.
Jethro blesses the LORD, 'greater than all gods,' and offers sacrifice. Confession. He owns the LORD above all.
Jethro blesses the LORD, 'greater than all gods,' and offers sacrifice. Confession. He owns the LORD above all.
Jethro blesses the LORD, 'greater than all gods,' and offers sacrifice. Confession. He owns the LORD above all.
Moses judges the people alone from morning to evening. Overburdened. One man bears too heavy a load.
Moses judges the people alone from morning to evening. Overburdened. One man bears too heavy a load.
Moses judges the people alone from morning to evening. Overburdened. One man bears too heavy a load.
Moses judges the people alone from morning to evening. Overburdened. One man bears too heavy a load.
Jethro warns, 'thou wilt surely wear away,' for the thing is too heavy. Wise counsel. Sharing the work is needful.
Jethro warns, 'thou wilt surely wear away,' for the thing is too heavy. Wise counsel. Sharing the work is needful.
He counsels Moses to appoint able men, fearing God, to judge the small matters. Delegate. Order and helpers ease the burden.
He counsels Moses to appoint able men, fearing God, to judge the small matters. Delegate. Order and helpers ease the burden.
He counsels Moses to appoint able men, fearing God, to judge the small matters. Delegate. Order and helpers ease the burden.
He counsels Moses to appoint able men, fearing God, to judge the small matters. Delegate. Order and helpers ease the burden.
He counsels Moses to appoint able men, fearing God, to judge the small matters. Delegate. Order and helpers ease the burden.
Moses heeds him, sets rulers over thousands, and Jethro departs. Heeded. Humble leadership takes good advice.
Moses heeds him, sets rulers over thousands, and Jethro departs. Heeded. Humble leadership takes good advice.
